scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n shared,core,backend,frontend -c blue,cyan,green,magenta "pnpm dev:shared" "pnpm dev:core" "pnpm dev:backend" "pnpm dev:frontend"
scripts.build: pnpm run clean:dist && pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run sync-dist
scripts.clean:deps: rm -rf node_modules pnpm-lock.yaml apps/backend/node_modules apps/frontend/node_modules packages/shared/node_modules packages/core/node_modules
